summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Softogram website updates including new logo design, Case Studies section, social media integration, policy pages, and contact form functionality
passed_tests: New redesigned logo with abstract S shape and cyan 'gram' highlighting
Navbar positioning with proper top-6 gap from header
Case Studies section displaying Polluxkart project with complete details
Tech stack display showing React.js, FastAPI, Node.js, PostgreSQL correctly
Instagram and Facebook social media icons in Contact section
Footer Legal column with all 4 policy page links
Privacy Policy page loading at /privacy-policy with dark theme
Terms & Conditions page loading at /terms-and-conditions with dark theme
Refund Policy page loading at /refund-policy with dark theme
Cookie Policy page loading at /cookie-policy with dark theme
Policy pages having cyan left borders on section headings
Policy pages maintaining same navbar and footer as main site
Contact form backend integration with successful submission
Form validation and success notifications working
Navigation between policy pages and home page working
